heading: Date of transfer of utilities
label: 2372 Date of transfer of utilities
text: Transfers of utilities shall be made as soon as possible, but in any event, not later than five years after , in the case of Oak Ridge and Richland, or, in the case of Los Alamos, not later than .August 4, 1955June 30, 1998
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “not later than ” for “not later than five years after the date it is included within this chapter”.Pub.
